title: Refactor a cond-only module into heads + cond where genuinely needed
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.RoleRouter` from test_fixtures/cond_role_router.ex. `route/1` becomes pattern-matched heads (no cond). `permission/2` has a dynamic `resource.owner_id == user.id` check that needs cross-arg pinning in heads. Apply both transformations. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.RoleRouter do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Module-wide cond removal plus the cross-arg pinning insight.
